basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Nurse and Paramedical Dialysis Technician Posts
basic_details.post_name: Contractual Nurse and Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Contractual Nurse and Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Oil India Limited. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Oil India Contractual Nurse and Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation for OBC (NCL) is 43 years for Dialysis Technician.

qualification.education_qualification: Class 10+2, Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM), B.Sc. Nursing, Diploma/Certificate in Dialysis Technology
qualification.details: Contractual Nurse: Passed Class 10+2 in any stream from a Government Recognized Board/University and Passed Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) from an Institute recognized by Indian Nursing Council, Government of India with minimum 02 years post-qualification full-time work experience as Nurse in a Government Hospital or PSU Hospital or well-equipped Private Hospital of repute OR Passed B.Sc. Nursing from an Institute/University recognized by Indian Nursing Council, Government of India with valid registration with the State Nursing Council and minimum 01 year post-qualification full-time work experience as Nurse in a Government Hospital or PSU Hospital or well-equipped Private Hospital of repute. Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician: Passed Class 10+2 in Science stream from a Government Recognized Board/University and Passed Diploma/Certificate in Dialysis Technology of minimum 02 years duration from a Government Recognized Board/University/Institute with minimum 02 years post qualification full time work experience in the field of Dialysis from a Government Hospital or well-equipped Private Hospital of repute.

salary_details.details: Contractual Nurse: Fixed Emolument: ₹ 24,960.00 per month; Variable Emolument: ₹ 960.00 per day for each working day Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician: Fixed Emolument: ₹ 21,450.00 per month; Variable Emolument: ₹ 825.00 per day for each working day

selection_process: Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s) Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for OIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Contractual Nurse and Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician posts is scheduled for 26 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by Oil India?
faq.answer: Oil India has released a total of 5 vacancies for the positions of Contractual Nurse and Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC (NCL) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Contractual Nurse post?
faq.answer: For Contractual Nurse, candidates need to have passed Class 10+2 and possess a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) or B.Sc. Nursing with relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician?
faq.answer: The salary for Contractual Paramedical Dialysis Technician is Rs. 21,450.00 per month as fixed emolument, plus a variable emolument of Rs. 825.00 per day for each working day.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for OIL recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the OIL office in Duliajan, Assam. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s) followed by the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Duliajan, Assam. While not explicitly stated, it is generally advisable for candidates to check the eligibility criteria regarding domicile or work experience requirements in the official notification.
